DP.060.0000:
Yay! I got a Pal Pad at the
Pokémon Wi-Fi Club downstairs!
DP.060.0001:
Switch on the PC at any Pokémon
Center and connect to the\r
Pokémon Storage System.\f
That’s all you need to do to store
or bring out your Pokémon.
DP.060.0002:
Hmmm...\f
What is your favorite kind of
Trainer? Can you tell me?\f
DP.060.0003:
Which kind of Trainer would you like
to be?
DP.060.0004:
[010E,0000] is the kind of
Trainer you want to be?
DP.060.0005:
I see! So [010E,0000] is the
kind of Trainer you like.\f
If that’s the case, others may come
to see you in the same way.\f
DP.060.0006: OK, then I’ll just talk to you later!
DP.060.0007:
Hello! You’ve been mistaken for
[010E,0000], haven’t you?\f
But I think you can also pass for
a different kind of Trainer.\f
So, how about telling me what kind of
Trainer that you like?\f
